How do I invite a team member?

question: What are the pricing plans?
answer: VortexIQ offers three pricing plans: Starter, Pro, and Enterprise. The Starter plan is free and supports up to 3 projects and 2 team members. The Pro plan costs $29 per month and supports unlimited projects. The Enterprise plan is custom-priced for organizations with 20 or more users.

question: What is the base URL for the VortexIQ API?
answer: The base URL for all VortexIQ API requests is https://api.vortexiq.com/v1. Always specify the version in your requests to avoid potential issues.

question: What HTTP status code means I exceeded the rate limit?
answer: The HTTP status code for exceeding the rate limit is 429 Too Many Requests. This code is returned when you've made too many requests within the specified time frame.

question: How do I create a new project using the API?
answer: To create a new project using the API, you can send a POST request to the endpoint /v1/projects with a body containing the name and description fields. You can use a tool like cURL or a code snippet that sends a POST request to this endpoint with the project details. Make sure you're using a valid API key and have the correct headers set up.

question: What SDK is available for Python?
answer: The Python SDK can be installed with pip using the command "pip install vortexiq." It requires Python 3.8 or higher.

question: How many API requests per hour does the Pro plan allow?
answer: The Pro plan allows 2000 API requests per hour.

question: What should I do if VortexIQ is loading slowly?
answer: Check your internet connection speed to ensure it's stable. Try using a different browser, such as Chrome, Firefox, or Edge. Also, disable any browser extensions, especially ad blockers and VPNs.

question: Why am I not receiving email notifications?
answer: Please check your spam folder for email notifications from VortexIQ. Add noreply@vortexiq.com to your email whitelist or contacts to ensure you receive our notifications. Also, verify your notification preferences under Settings then Notifications.

question: What file size limit does VortexIQ support for uploads?
answer: For standard users, VortexIQ supports up to 50MB per upload. Enterprise customers, however, have a larger file size limit of 500MB.

question: How do I fix Jira sync issues?
answer: To fix Jira sync issues, try regenerating your Jira API token and update it in VortexIQ integrations. This is usually the cause of problems with Jira syncs.

question: What is the base URL for the VortexIQ API?

question: How do I create a new project using the API?
answer: To create a new project using the API, you need to use the POST /v1/projects endpoint. You'll need to provide name and description fields in your request. This can be done with the curl command: curl -X POST https://api.vortexiq.com/v1/projects -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Project Name", "description": "Project Description"}' -H 'Authorization: Bearer your_api_key'.

answer: If VortexIQ is loading slowly, first check your internet connection speed. You can also try using a different browser such as Chrome, Firefox, or Edge. Disable browser extensions, especially ad blockers and VPNs, and clear your browser cache by pressing Ctrl Shift Delete.

answer: Check your spam folder, and add noreply@vortexiq.com to your email whitelist or contacts. Also, verify your notification preferences under Settings then Notifications, and ensure your email address is verified under Settings then Account.

answer: VortexIQ supports files up to 50MB per upload. However, enterprise customers have a higher limit of 500MB. If you need to upload files larger than your plan limit, please contact support.

answer: To cancel your subscription, go to Settings, then Billing, and finally click Cancel Plan. This will initiate the cancellation process and take effect at the end of your current billing period.

question: How do I connect Slack?
answer: To connect Slack, go to Settings, then Integrations, and click Connect next to Slack. Ensure the VortexIQ Slack app has permission to post in your channels.

question: What roles can I assign to users?
answer: You can assign the following roles to users: Admin, Editor, Commenter, and Viewer. Owners also have a role but it's not explicitly listed as a role that can be assigned. They seem to be the account administrators.

question: How do I generate an API key?
answer: To generate an API key, go to Settings, then Developer, then API Keys, and select New Key. Once created, your API key will be shown only once, so be sure to store it securely. Never commit API keys to source code or share them publicly.

question: What happens after 5 failed login attempts?
answer: After 5 consecutive failed login attempts, your account is temporarily locked. Account lockouts last 15 minutes and reset automatically.

question: How do I export my data?
answer: To export your workspace data, go to Settings, then Data, and click Export Workspace. Your export file will be delivered as a ZIP file to your registered email within 24 hours.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: To delete your account, go to Settings, then Account, and click Delete Account. Account deletion is permanent. All data will be purged within 30 days of deletion.

question: What is the base URL for the VortexIQ API?
answer: The base URL for all API requests is https://api.vortexiq.com/v1. This must be included in your API requests.

question: What HTTP status code means I exceeded the rate limit?
answer: The HTTP status code 429 Too Many Requests means you have exceeded your rate limit.

question: How do I create a new project using the API?
answer: You can create a new project using the POST /v1/projects API endpoint. This requires a name and description, but the documentation doesn't specify if other fields are required. You can find full API documentation at docs.vortexiq.com/api.

question: What SDK is available for Python?
answer: The official VortexIQ SDK available for Python requires Python 3.8 or higher. You can install the Python SDK with pip install vortexiq.

question: How many API requests per hour does the Pro plan allow?
answer: The Pro plan accounts are limited to 2000 API requests per hour. This is also specified in the v2 beta section of the documentation.

question: What should I do if VortexIQ is loading slowly?
answer: Check your internet connection speed and try using a different browser such as Chrome, Firefox, or Edge. Also, disable browser extensions, especially ad blockers and VPNs, then clear your browser cache by pressing Ctrl Shift Delete. If the issue persists, consider contacting support.

question: Why am I not receiving email notifications?
answer: Please check your spam folder for email notifications from noreply@vortexiq.com. You can also add our email address to your whitelist or contacts to ensure delivery. Verify your notification preferences under Settings then Notifications.

question: What file size limit does VortexIQ support for uploads?
answer: VortexIQ supports files up to 50MB per upload for personal accounts and up to 500MB for Enterprise customers. If your plan has a different limit, contact support if you need to upload larger files.

answer: Jira sync issues are usually caused by expired Jira API tokens. To fix them, regenerate your Jira API token and update it in VortexIQ integrations.

question: Is VortexIQ SOC 2 certified?
answer: Yes, VortexIQ is SOC 2 Type II certified with annual audits by a third party. This certification ensures VortexIQ meets the high standards for security, availability, and processing integrity. We provide compliance reports and certificates upon request at security@vortexiq.com.

question: How is data encrypted in VortexIQ?
answer: All data stored in VortexIQ is encrypted at rest using AES-256 encryption, and all data transmitted between clients and VortexIQ servers uses TLS 1.3 encryption. Database backups are also encrypted using the same AES-256 standard.

question: How do I report a security vulnerability?
answer: To report a security vulnerability, you can email security@vortexiq.com.

question: Does VortexIQ comply with GDPR?
answer: Yes, VortexIQ complies with GDPR for all users in the European Union. Data is stored in EU-based servers, meeting GDPR requirements.

question: How long are audit logs retained?
answer: Audit logs are retained for 12 months on Pro plans and 7 years on Enterprise plans.

question: How do I create my first project?
answer: To create your first project, click "New Project" on the dashboard. Choose a clear descriptive name that reflects the project goal and set visibility to Private or Public. Add a description so team members understand the project scope.
